The Collection

Every Bababoefoe edition in the registry. Each row's QR tag opens that edition's story page. This mirrors editions.json — the source of truth physical tags are printed from.

IDEditionColorwayTypePocket keepsake
ed-001Pirate Bababoefoetealcorea crumb treasure-map
ed-002Chef Bababoefoeorangecorea tiny warm baguette
ed-003Police Bababoefoebluecorea tiny silver whistle
ed-004Santa Bababoefoebrownseasonala small golden bell
ed-005Witch Bababoefoepurpleseasonala single dried aster
Bababoefoe · every edition carries its own story.
